pkgmetadata.longdescription: Tarsafe[Unit Tests](httpsgithub.combeatsbearstarsafeworkflowsUnit20Testsbadge.svg)Tarsafe is a drop-in replacement for the tarfile module from the standard library to safely handle the vulnerable extractall() method. Inspired by a [6 year old security bug](httpsbugs.python.orgissue21109). Installation pip install tarsafe Usageimport sysfrom tarsafe import TarSafetar TarSafe.open(sys.argv[1], r)tar.extractall()tar.close()
